title: Congress demands Dept of War release 46 secret UFO videos: ‘You’re gonna see some weird f–king s–t’
description: Members of Congress are demanding 46 military videos from the Department of War which insiders say offer convincing proof that advanced, non-human craft are operating on Earth.Rep. title: Tennessee Congressman Drops UFO Bombshell, Says People Who Know Are Disappearing
description: Tennessee Rep. Tim Burchett dropped a major bombshell on Newsmax, warning that what he’s been briefed on by multiple intelligence agencies about UFOs and aliens is so shocking it would keep Americans up at night.

title: Aliens are our friends not demons and we shouldn't fear them, say UFO spotters
description: UFO boffs say we should be 'optimistic' about meeting extra terrestrial life after world leaders came out to say they believe aliens could be 'demons' here to torment us.

title: 'You're Gonna See Some Weird F*King S*T': Congress Demands the Release of 46 Secret UFO Videos From Dept of War
description: The US Congress has demanded the release of 46 classified military videos that could reshape public understanding of UFOs. The footage includes radar data, satellite imagery, and underwater encounters.

title: Congress demands Dept of War release 46 secret UFO videos: ‘You’re gonna see some weird f------ s---’
description: Members of Congress are demanding 46 military videos from the Department of War which insiders say offer convincing proof that advanced, non-human craft are operating on Earth. Rep. Anna Paulina Luna (R-Fla.) requested the long list of explosively titled files on Wednesday, which include 45 previously unreleased military clips. The presence of Unidentified Aerial Phenomena “in and around the sensitive airspaces of US military installations poses a threat to the security of the armed forces and their readiness,” according to the April 1 letter addressed to Secretary Pete Hegseth.
